notes: Frozen/applicable_false: agent=partial, daemon=incapable. Kiro routes all models through a single AWS credit-metered endpoint (auto = task-routing, not provider failover), and the JSONL carries no model/provider/token/cost — a provider/model swap leaves no observable trace, so the scenario's mid-turn ModelName-change bullet can never fire. No lifecycle phases asserted; the genuinely-observable working→ready close is covered by basic-turn and turn-aborted-by-error.
